name: lyhna-desktop
description: Lyhna Desktop — local-by-default AI Work Receipt app (v1 in progress). Wraps the lyhna-witness engine + the @lyhna/mcp adapter as a local app. Run your agents. Walk away. Come back to receipts.

scripts.start: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron .
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder
